name: process-design-plugin
description: Process Design with extra benefits — a thought-partner skill that walks you from fuzzy intuition to a build-ready spec, bundled with qa-agents (adversarial review + root-cause analysis), dmaic (Define/Measure/Analyze/Improve/Control) for metrics review, elons-operating-algorithm (one-shot pressure test against any artifact), and test-loop (executable regression suites).

plugins.name: process-design
plugins.description: Ten composable skills for designing processes that build agents can actually execute. The headliner walks you through Steps 0–8: optional Ingest of an existing description, Working Backwards anchor with distributed deletion at every sub-step, parallel gap-probe fan-out, early Render of the flowchart with a hard-gate user review BEFORE metrics design, concentrated final pruning post-visual, metrics across four categories, review cadence + DMAIC handoff, structural + adversarial Verify, build-target handoff, and optional spec↔source Reconcile. The flowchart is the primary deliverable and is foreground-surfaced in the agent response. Sibling skills: qa-agents (Finder/Auditor/Referee adversarial review + root-cause analysis on confirmed major findings), dmaic + 5 phase skills (Define/Measure/Analyze/Improve/Control), elons-operating-algorithm (one-shot pressure test of any artifact, running Elon's full 5-step algorithm — question, delete, simplify, accelerate, automate — and producing a structured deletion-first review note), and test-loop (builds the executable regression suite that locks a spec's conventions into tests). All independently invokable.
